ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country in USD */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "environmental_policy_rating" INTEGER /* Environmental policy rating (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission data */,
  "gas_co2" REAL /* Carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions in million metric tons */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the emission data */,
  "emission_source" TEXT /* Specific source of the emission */,
  "emission_sector" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission sector */,
  "emission_subsector" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission subsector */,
  "emission_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission type */,
  "emission_category" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission category */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of the emission */,
  "emission_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the emission value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_emission_type FOREIGN KEY ("emission_type") REFERENCES emission_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_emission_category FOREIGN KEY ("emission_category") REFERENCES emission_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_emission_sector FOREIGN KEY ("emission_sector") REFERENCES emission_sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_emission_subsector FOREIGN KEY ("emission_subsector") REFERENCES emission_subsectors ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the subregion belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the subregion data was last updated */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the subregion in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission category data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission type data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission sector data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_subsectors" (
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission subsector */,
  "subsector_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission subsector */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission sector the subsector belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission subsector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission subsector data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission report */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission type */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission sector */,
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission subsector */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the emission */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the emission value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the emission report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission report was generated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reports_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES emission_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reports_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES emission_sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reports_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reports_subsector_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsector_id") REFERENCES emission_subsectors ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES emission_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role and its permissions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user role data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission data */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data version information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data file information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the readme file information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
